commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the new local review support, auth, and automation surface, not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the PR adds no dependencies and keeps GitHub write credentials stripped while preserving Codex auth only for local-only review. (sha=878702947358b6ae5f08767da52904c7b93a015f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local-only ClawSweeper review mode, local Codex preflight script, managed PR checkout behavior, Windows Codex launcher handling, docs, a repo-local skill, CI coverage, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new local maintainer workflow rather than fixing a broken existing contract. The observable check is the final-head terminal proof for pnpm run codex:local:check and pnpm run review -- --local-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the new local review support, auth, and automation surface, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: [codex] Add local ClawSweeper review workflow
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a local ClawSweeper review workflow for maintainers who want advisory output before PR submission or re-review. This was based on a discussion with @joshavant on Discord.

## Changes

- Add `pnpm run review -- --local-only` for read-only local issue/PR review without the starter GitHub comment.
- Add `pnpm run codex:local:check` to verify local Codex CLI auth and execution without printing secrets.
- Preserve local Codex auth only for `--local-only`; hosted/normal workers still strip Codex/OpenAI/GitHub write credentials.
- Prefer the Windows Codex app binary for local-only review and support Node-shebang Codex shims on Windows.
- Add `.agents/skills/local-clawsweeper-review` as an optional ergonomic Codex wrapper.
- Add `docs/local-clawsweeper-review.md`, including one-PR-at-a-time setup, CLI auth, clean target checkout guidance, managed checkout behavior, and embedded optional skill contents.

## Validation

- `pnpm run check`
- Final-head Codex preflight on `878702947358b6ae5f08767da52904c7b93a015f`:

```text
pnpm run codex:local:check

Codex binary: codex
Checking Codex login status...
Checking Codex login status completed in 0.1s.
Running Codex smoke test with gpt-5.5...
Running Codex smoke test with gpt-5.5 completed in 32.8s.
Codex local preflight passed.
```

- Final-head local review proof on `878702947358b6ae5f08767da52904c7b93a015f`:

```text
pnpm run review -- --local-only --target-repo openclaw/clawsweeper --item-number 357 --artifact-dir artifacts/local-review-357-final-proof

Local ClawSweeper review for openclaw/clawsweeper#357

Preparing target checkout
  mode: managed PR checkout
  path: artifacts/local-review-357-final-proof/target
  base: main

Loading review item
  item: PR #357
  title: [codex] Add local ClawSweeper review workflow
  state: open

Collecting GitHub context

Running Codex review
  timeout: 20m 0s
  stdout: artifacts/local-review-357-final-proof/codex/357.1.codex.stdout.log
  stderr: artifacts/local-review-357-final-proof/codex/357.1.codex.stderr.log

Review complete
  elapsed: 2m 33s
  decision: keep_open
  confidence: high
  action: kept_open
  report: artifacts/local-review-357-final-proof/357.md
```

Local review artifact summary:

- `review_status=complete`
- `decision=keep_open`
- `confidence=high`
- `action_taken=kept_open`
- `review_service_tier=fast`
- `local_checkout_access=verified`
- `main_sha=bd03fe34c0a49e17735186bc15e6e8656d03e2e2`
- `pull_head_sha=878702947358b6ae5f08767da52904c7b93a015f`
- Managed target checkout remained clean after the run: `## clawsweeper/pr-357`

No GitHub apply/close command was run; this was local-only advisory review proof.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
